core_payload.content:
# DeepMine Miner Agent

## 1. Role
DeepMine Miner Agent will become the industrial extraction worker of the quarry, capable of longer and more disciplined digs that preserve provenance, package ore more cleanly, and optimize for signal rather than raw text volume.

## 2. Future Miner Contract
The miner will conduct multi-stage extraction across providers, corpora, and open-web sources while preserving source envelopes, extraction boundaries, and downstream refinement expectations. It will remain a miner rather than a judge, but its ore will become more usable and more inspectable.

## 3. Operational Consequence
Future refinery quality will improve because mined output will arrive with stronger provenance, clearer packaging, and better economic discipline. The system will waste less money turning weakly shaped ore into later-stage confusion.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
DeepMine Miner Agent supports To Dig Deep by excavating source signal with rigor rather than noise.

neuro_concentrate.summary: DeepMine Miner Agent defines the future industrial extraction worker of N1Hub: deeper multi-pass digs, stronger provenance envelopes, better ore packaging, and more deliberate cost-to-signal optimization across long-running mining jobs.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
